CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2022 Continued To Dec-28-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Antislapp Motion And Motion
Off Calendar Oct-10-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT LEGAL ASSISTANCE TO THE ELDERLY 501(C)(3)'s Anti-SLAPP Motion.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed "anti-SLAPP motion" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-10-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT LEGAL ASSISTANCE TO THE ELDERLY 501(C)(3)'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed demurrer is sustained without leave to amend.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
